description_long: This apple is round and plump, with a slightly flattened top and bottom. Its skin displays a blend of deep red and yellow-green hues, with the red coloration more prominent on one side and yellow-green dominating the other. The surface is smooth and glossy, with subtle speckling and natural mottling typical of many apple varieties. There is a shallow dimple at the top where the stem would be, though the stem itself is not visible. The apple appears fresh, with no visible blemishes or damage. Its coloration and sheen suggest it is ripe and ready to eat.
description: A round, glossy apple with red and yellow-green mottled skin, smooth and unblemished.
description_view_0: Mostly red with yellow speckles, shallow dimple at the top.
description_view_1: Predominantly yellow-green with faint red streaks, smooth surface.
description_view_2: Yellow-green side with subtle red mottling, round and plump.
description_view_3: Balanced mix of red and yellow, glossy and unblemished.
